trivia_bullets.text: Memorial to Folly is the black member of the five-card Memorial cycle in Dominaria (2018), one per color. The Memorials are uncommon utility taplands framing Dominaria's ruins as sites of ancient significance, thematically rooted in the plane's millennia of catastrophic war and recovery. Released April 27, 2018 as Magic's 25th-anniversary flagship set.

Sacrifice cost {2}{B} is the cheapest activation in the five-card cycle. Black graveyard recursion is broadly relevant across Commander. EDHREC rank 2891 overall, appearing in approximately 45,942 Commander decks — the highest rank among the four BBL-held Memorials.
Reprinted in Commander 2019 (C19). No further reprints per Scryfall print record.

Community sentiment on MTGSalvation and EDHREC characterizes Memorial to Folly as the most broadly applicable Memorial for Commander due to black graveyard synergy being pervasive. The EDHREC Dominaria land review called the cycle situationally playable in slower metas, with Folly singled out as the strongest.
sources: Community sentiment — EDHREC Dominaria set review article

related_cards.name: Memorial to Unity
related_cards.note: green cycle member; not in BBL corpus

related_cards.name: Deserted Temple
related_cards.note: land with graveyard-adjacent utility in black Commander shells; frequent cycle companion
